nodes.name: Caligavis
nodes.summary: Caligavis（Caligavis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如黃臉吸蜜鳥、Black-throated honeyeater、Obscure honeyeater。

nodes.name: Black-throated honeyeater
nodes.summary: Black-throated honeyeater（Caligavis subfrenata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-throated honeyeater。

nodes.name: Black-throated honeyeater
nodes.summary: The black-throated honeyeater (Caligavis subfrenata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. The black-throated honeyeater was originally described in 1876 as Lichenostomus subfrenatus, but was moved to Caligavis after a molecular phylogenetic analysis published in 2011 showed that Lichenostomus was polyphyletic. References
nodes.shortSummary: The black-throated honeyeater (Caligavis subfrenata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea.
